meaning: n.[建]叶尖饰,尖顶饰,顶尖,物件顶端的装饰物
examples: The handles and lid finial are accented with black.
The cabinet is surmounted by a finely cast gilt bronze urn finial.
Finial: Curve that finishes a main stroke in some italic faces, replacing the serif of the roman.
And Lycett tops his dome with a golden poppyhead finial, like the crocket of a Gothic spire.
It shines from its perch above display cabinets stuffed with shoes, bibs and other artifacts of the organization's 125-year history, the finial atop the silver cup slightly askew.
